checks.name: root-cause-proof
checks.detail: The live public page before the fix injected `window.HAPPYTgApiBase = "http://localhost:4000"`, and the browser then failed `POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/miniapp/auth/session` with `TypeError: Failed to fetch` plus a CORS/preflight rejection.

checks.name: request-aware-public-routing
checks.detail: The final Mini App renderer now derives browser API base from the incoming forwarded public origin/prefix. The live public probe after restart shows `window.HAPPYTgApiBase = ""` and a browser-side `POST https://happytg.gerta.crazedns.ru/api/v1/miniapp/auth/session`.

checks.name: localhost-dev-fallback
checks.detail: Deterministic unit coverage proves that direct localhost development without reverse-proxy headers still falls back to `HAPPYTG_API_URL`.

checks.name: visible-feedback-and-ux
checks.detail: The auth shell, approval actions, and new-task flow now expose explicit loading/success/error feedback with a clearer Russian mobile-first navigation shell.

checks.name: verification-and-release-metadata
checks.detail: Scoped Mini App checks, API tests, repo-wide typecheck/lint/test/build, env-backed doctor/verify, release metadata validation, and task validation all completed. Remaining warnings are unrelated local environment conditions.
